plan.criterion: The entity must demonstrate an average annual turnover of at least Rs.20 Lakh per annum for the past 3 financial years, supported by three years of audited financial statements.

fields.name: annual_turnover
fields.description: Annual turnover for each financial year as stated in audited financial statements

fields.name: financial_year
fields.description: Financial year corresponding to the annual turnover (e.g., FY2021, FY2022)

raw_response:
{
  "criterion_id": "CRIT_027",
